instruction: Review the next inbound note and act on it.
source: exact-family failure: same multi-bill OCR enumeration bug as cf90740 t066 (Juniper); current PROD slot has Badger keyword. Inbox payload: 'OCR all bills related to Badger'.
notes: 4 Badger-related bills must all be converted from table format to YAML frontmatter (`---\nrecord_type: bill...`). Only one bill has 'badger' or related keywords in its filename — the others must be discovered via content scan.
